subparts.text: List the difference between production and services?
Classify the concept of Product Design?
Explain the importance of Material Requirements Planning?

questions.question_text: Explain productivity. List the factors that affect productivity. And how can it be improved?
Define production system? Discuss in detail using examples?
Discuss Plant Location? Identify different factors affecting Plant Location.

The average annual consumption of a material is 18,250 units at a price of Rs. 36.50 per unit. The storage cost is 20% on an average inventory. Ordering cost is Rs. 50. Compute the quantity is to be purchased at a time?
Illustrate the need of “six sigma” from manufacturing and service industry’s view point, Elaborate.
Interpret the steps involved in value analysis? Show the criteria for selection of vendors?
Discuss the role of flexibility and agility in modern supply chains.
Identify how smart pricing and IT affect supply chain management. How can these aspects promote supply chain performance measurement and improvement?
